details.reasoning: The implementation fully satisfies all rubric requirements. A new package directory exists at packages/rest-api-client-generator/ with proper package.json dependencies (@prisma/dmmf, @prisma/generator, @prisma/generator-helper). The entry point src/bin.ts correctly uses generatorHandler with both onManifest and onGenerate callbacks. The generator (src/generator.ts) implements the Generator interface, reads DMMF, and iterates over models/enums. For each model, TypeScript interfaces (buildModelInterface, buildCreateInput, buildUpdateInput, buildWhereInput, buildWhereUniqueInput) and all five CRUD methods (findMany, findUnique, create, update, delete) are generated with proper types. Output is written to outputDir/index.ts. The code follows TypeScript conventions throughout (native private fields, proper async/await, type annotations, error handling) and adheres to Prisma generator patterns. Comprehensive tests verify functionality, build/helper files follow monorepo structure, and tsconfig files are properly configured.
